title: Whatsapp | PoliceStationRepUK — Find Accredited Police Station Reps

headings.text: Join the Police Station Reps WhatsApp Group
Need a Police Station Rep in Kent Now?
Need a Police Station Rep in Kent?

content: Join the Police Station Reps WhatsApp GroupThe UK's free WhatsApp community for accredited police station representatives and criminal defence solicitors — get real-time job alerts, network with peers, and find cover work across England & Wales.Are you a criminal solicitor needing urgent cover? Or a freelance police station rep looking for more work?Join our WhatsApp group to see real-time job postings for police station and court coverage work.Closed Group - Accredited Reps OnlyWhatsApp group membership is for fully accredited professionals who can provide proof of accreditation or employment with a criminal law firm.Must be fully accredited (not in training)Proof required: LCCSA/CLSA membership, Duty Solicitor status, or firm confirmationVerification checks with Law Society and Legal Aid Agency before approvalJoin requests without verification will be declined. Same verification applies to directory profiles.Instant Job NotificationsReal-time postings from solicitors who need representation at police stations and courts.Direct CommunicationChat directly with solicitors to confirm availability and agree the brief.Free to JoinThere's no cost to join the group or access postings.Ready to Get Started?Please text us to be added to the group.Text: (07535) 494446Text 07535 494446⚡ URGENT COVER AVAILABLENeed a Police Station Rep in Kent Now?Duty Solicitor • 24/7 Immediate Coverage Across Kent & Met Border Areas(01732) 247427SMS: (07535) 494446Visit PoliceStationAgent.com →Helpful ResourcesFind a RepBrowse our directory of accredited repsBrowse DirectoryRegisterJoin our directory and get job alertsRegister NowForms LibraryCRM1, CRM2 and essential formsView FormsStation ContactsFind phone numbers for UK stationsStation Directory⭐ TESTING OFFERWant Maximum Visibility?Become a Featured Representative and appear at the top of all searches⚡ First 5 Spotlight subscriptions: Just £5/year whilst testingLearn More & Apply →
